title: Removing power_up parameter as string in \$_DFF_PN0_ cells

features.name: dff_power_up_parameter_string_type
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop with a power_up parameter that is incorrectly typed as a string instead of a bit vector, causing initialization value corruption

features.name: dff_power_up_parameter_bitvector_type
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop with a power_up parameter correctly typed as a bit vector value for proper initialization
